app.name: MohsenTracker
app.tagline: Become your next version. Build the habits. See the future.

onboarding.welcomeBody: Tiny daily actions compound into the person you become. Let's design who you're becoming, then build the habits that get you there.
onboarding.languageBody: You can change this anytime in settings.
onboarding.futureSelfNameTitle: What's the name of your future self?
onboarding.futureSelfNameBody: A label for who you're becoming. Something like "{example}". You'll see this every day.
onboarding.visionTitle: Who do you want to become in 1 year?
onboarding.visionBody: Describe the person you want to be in 2–3 sentences. We'll show this on your dashboard so you remember why you started.
onboarding.visionPlaceholder: I am a person who prays on time, reads daily, and treats my family with kindness…
onboarding.whyTitle: Why does this matter to you?
onboarding.whyBody: When motivation fades, your reason is what keeps you going. Write it like you'd say it out loud.
onboarding.whyPlaceholder: Because I want my children to see a father who keeps his word, prays on time, and never gives up…
onboarding.categoriesBody: Start with what feels right. You can change this later.

home.noHabits: You haven't added any habits yet.

habit.name: Habit name
habit.replacementHint: What good habit will you do instead?

progress.title: Progress
progress.noStreaks: Complete a habit today to start a streak.

habitDetail.atStake: What's at stake if you stop

generic.lostYear: Skip it and you forfeit {value} {unit} every year.
generic.lostDecade: A decade off and {decade} {unit} are gone.
generic.yearlyNoUnit: Doing this every day adds up to {days} successful days a year.
generic.lostYearNoUnit: Skip it and you lose {days} successful days a year.
generic.lostDecadeNoUnit: A decade off and you forfeit {decade} successful days.

reading.p2: Across a decade, {decadeBooks} books. A small library.
reading.c1: Skip a year and that's {books} books unread.
reading.c2: A decade off and {decadeBooks} books are gone forever.
reading.hadithText: Read! In the name of your Lord who created.

saving.p3: About {thirtyYear} after 30 years — small money becomes big money.
saving.c1: Skip a year and {yearly} stays out of your future.
saving.c2: A decade off and {tenYear} of compounding is lost.
saving.hadithText: And whoever fears Allah, He will make for him a way out, and provide for him from where he does not expect.

exercise.p2: About {km} km on foot — like walking London to Paris {trips, plural, =1 {once} other {# times}}.
exercise.p3: Across a decade, {decadeHours} hours of strength built.
exercise.c1: Skip a year and that's {hours} hours your body never recovers.
exercise.c2: A decade off — your future self pays the bill.
exercise.hadithText: The strong believer is more beloved to Allah than the weak believer, while there is good in both.

quranPages.p2: You complete the Quran every {monthsPerKhatm} months — {khatmsPerYear, plural, =1 {one khatm} other {# khatmas}} a year.
quranPages.p3: Across a decade, {decadeKhatms} khatmas of revelation.
quranPages.c1: Skip a year — {pages} pages of the Quran unread.
quranPages.c2: A decade off — {decadeKhatms} khatmas you'll never make up.
quranPages.hadithText: The best of you are those who learn the Quran and teach it.

screenTime.p1: Stay at {limit} hours a day. Cut one hour and reclaim {daysReclaimed} days a year.
screenTime.p2: Across a decade, {decadeDaysReclaimed} days back in your life.
screenTime.c1: Slip back to old habits — {daysReclaimed} days a year scrolled into nothing.
screenTime.c2: A decade off — {decadeDaysReclaimed} days you can never get back.
screenTime.hadithText: From the goodness of a man's Islam is leaving what does not concern him.

tahajjud.p1: {nights} nights of closeness with Allah this year.
tahajjud.p2: {decadeNights} nights of tahajjud across a decade.
tahajjud.c1: Skip and {nights} nights of unique nearness pass without you.
tahajjud.hadithText: Our Lord descends to the lowest heaven in the last third of the night and says: Who is calling Me, that I may answer him? Who is asking Me, that I may give him?

sadaqah.p2: {decadeCount} acts across a decade — sadaqah jariyah that keeps giving.
sadaqah.c1: Skip a year — {count} doors of barakah you didn't open.
sadaqah.c2: A decade off — {decadeCount} acts of mercy that never happened.

learning.p2: About {decadeHours} hours over a decade — enough to master a new field.
learning.c1: Skip a year — {hours} hours of self that never gets built.
learning.c2: A decade off — a different person you'll never meet.
learning.hadithText: Whoever travels a path in search of knowledge, Allah makes easy for him a path to Paradise.

gheebat.p1: Hold the tongue. {days} days of clean speech this year.
gheebat.p2: Across a decade, that's {decadeDays} days you protected others' honour.
gheebat.c1: Slip back — every word eats good deeds you worked hard for.
gheebat.c2: A decade of careless speech is a decade of lost reward.
gheebat.hadithText: Do you know what backbiting is? It is mentioning your brother in a manner he dislikes.

futureSelf.thirtyDayHint: How consistent you've been per category.
futureSelf.noWhy: Add the reason that drives you.
futureSelf.noFutureSelfName: Give your future self a name.

quotes.q0: 10 pages a day → 12 books a year → 120 books in a decade. Still a small daily act, but a transformed life.
quotes.q1: 30 minutes of movement daily → 182 hours a year — enough to walk from London to Paris twice.
quotes.q2: 1 hour less scrolling daily → 15 full days reclaimed every year.
quotes.q3: 5 pages of Quran daily → completes the Quran every 4 months. Three khatmas a year.
quotes.q4: Tahajjud once a week → 52 nights of closeness with your Lord this year.
quotes.q5: 1 act of sadaqah daily → 365 acts a year. Charity that keeps giving.
quotes.q6: 15 minutes of learning daily → 91 hours of mastery a year. Compounded over a decade, a new identity.

presets.fivePrayers: Five daily prayers in their time
